text_back_translated: That's four tenths.

text: Four-tenths?   Oh!  My bad.  You guys are passing all my tests. You guys are paying attention.  All right.  Do you want to put in some of these other ones?  Because these ones, how can we figure out, shall I put the dot right over here, or should I put a dot over there?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: أربعة عشرات؟ أوه! خطئي. أنتم تتمون جميع اختباراتي. أنتم تتمون الإنتباه. حسناً. هل تريدون وضع بعض هذه الأخرى؟ لأن هذه، كيف يمكننا معرفة، هل يجب أن أضع النقطة هنا، أو يجب أن أضع النقطة هناك؟
text_back_translated: Four tenths? oh! my fault. you do all my tests. you pay attention. well. do you want to put some of these more? because these, how can we know, should I put the dot here, or should I put the dot there?

text: How many sixes do we have? We’ll be right there between two-eighths and zero-eighths.
speaker: student
text_arabic: كم عدد الستات التي لدينا؟ سنكون هناك بين ثمانية ثمانية و صفر ثمانية.
text_back_translated: How many statuses do we have? we'll be there between eight-eight and zero-eight.

text: Okay, so if I do that I’m going to put my dot right here, is that okay?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: حسناً، إذاً إن فعلت ذلك سأضع نقطتي هنا، هل هذا جيّد؟
text_back_translated: Well, then, if I do, I'll put my point here, is that good?

text: No!
speaker: multiple students
text_back_translated: No, no, no!

text: Why not?
speaker: teacher
text_back_translated: -Why not?

text: Because it has to be perfectly evenly inside of it. The eighths have to be all the same, they all have to be the same.
speaker: student
text_arabic: لأنه يجب أن يكون متساوياً تماماً بداخله يجب أن تكون الثمانية متشابهة، يجب أن تكون كلها متشابهة
text_back_translated: Because it must be exactly equal within it, the eight must be identical, they must all be identical.

text: The same what?  I know what you mean but I want you to say it.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: أعلم ما تعنيه لكن أريدك أن تقوليه
text_back_translated: I know what you mean, but I want you to say it.

text: The equivalent.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: It's the equivalent.

text: Student M, what is she trying to say?  I know you understand this too?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: الطالب (م) ، ما الذي تحاول قوله أنا أعلم أنك تفهم هذا أيضاً؟
text_back_translated: Student M, what are you trying to say I know you understand that too?

text: Mr. D, it’s 9:33.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Mr. D, at 9:33.

text: I know, we’ve got two more minutes, I want to see if some people can get this.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: أعلم، لدينا دقيقتين إضافيتين، أريد أن أرى إن كان بعض الناس يستطيعون الحصول على هذا.
text_back_translated: I know, we have two extra minutes, I want to see if some people can get this.

text: The equivalent fractions.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Fractions of the equation.

text: They are equivalent, but what’s equivalent on the number line?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: هم متكافئون، لكن ما هو متكافئ على خط الأرقام؟
text_back_translated: They are identical, but what is identical on the number line?

text: They have to be equal.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: They must be equal.

text: Equal what?
speaker: teacher
text_back_translated: Equal to what?

text: Size.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: The size.

text: Size, or distance.  Yes, you were there, I knew exactly what you meant but I wanted you to say it.  So each of these little spots have to be the same distance.  It’s just like slices on the cake or the pizza.  I would rather have this big slice right here than that.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: الحجم، أو المسافة. نعم، كنت هناك، كنت أعرف بالضبط ما تعنيه ولكنني أردت منك أن تقول ذلك. لذلك كل من هذه البقع الصغيرة يجب أن تكون نفس المسافة. انها تماما مثل قطع على الكعكة أو البيتزا. أنا أفضل أن يكون هذا الجزء الكبير هنا بدلا من ذلك.
text_back_translated: Yes, I was there, I knew exactly what you meant, but I wanted you to say it. So each of these little spots must be the same distance. It's just like slicing a cake or pizza.

text: Than have that small slice.
speaker: student
text_arabic: من الحصول على هذا الجزء الصغير.
text_back_translated: Of getting this little piece.

text: I probably shouldn't but I like that, I like pizza like that. So let’s put it right in the middle, one-eighth.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: على الأرجح لا يجب عليّ ولكنّي أحبّ ذلك، أحبّ البيتزا كهذه، لذا دعونا نضعها في الوسط، واحد ثمانية.
text_back_translated: I probably shouldn't, but I love it, I love pizza like this, so let's put it in the middle, one eight.

text: Smack in the middle.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Multiply in the middle.

text: Right in the middle.  One-eighth.  How about between four and six?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: في منتصف، واحد ثمانية، ماذا عن بين أربعة وستة؟
text_back_translated: In the middle, one eight, what about between four and six?

text: Five.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Five.

text: Five.  Right in the middle again?
speaker: teacher
text_back_translated: Five, in the middle again?

text: Yes.
speaker: multiple students
text_back_translated: - Yes, yes, yes

text: Okay.  Five-eighths.  And one more.  How about with this one?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: حسناً، خمسة ثمانية، وواحدة أخرى، ماذا عن هذه؟
text_back_translated: Well, five-eight, one more, how about this one?

text: Seven-eighths.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Seven eight

text: Seven-eighths.  And this is going to be…  If we want it, we can put it eight over eight, okay?
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: سبعة ثمانية، وهذه ستكون... لو أردنا، يمكننا أن نضعها ثمانية على ثمانية، حسناً؟
text_back_translated: Seven eight, and that would be... if we wanted to, we could put it eight on eight, okay?

text: [Inaudible]
speaker: student
text_back_translated: [Unheard of]

text: We don’t have time, I know you guys want to keep on going on this and you like the fractions and all…
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: لا نملك وقت، أعلم أنكم ترغبون في مواصلة هذا وتحبون الكسور وكل...
text_back_translated: We don't have time, I know you guys want to keep this going and love the breaks and all...

text: It’s quite easy.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: It's very simple.

text: You enjoy it when you understand it, right?  And you guys are starting to understand this stuff.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: تستمتع بها عندما تفهمها وأنتم تبدأون في فهم هذه الأشياء
text_back_translated: You enjoy it when you understand it and you begin to understand these things.

text: Mr. D, on the next page they did it for us.
speaker: student
text_arabic: سيّد (دي) ، في الصفحة التالية فعلوا ذلك لنا.
text_back_translated: Mr. D., on the next page, they did that for us.

text: On the next page – what we’re going to do tomorrow, not tomorrow unless you guys want to come in on Saturday.
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: في الصفحة التالية ما سنفعله غداً ليس غداً إلا إذا أردتم القدوم يوم السبت
text_back_translated: On the next page is what we're going to do tomorrow, not tomorrow unless you want to come on Saturday.

text: Yeah, I’ll come Saturday.
speaker: student
text_back_translated: Yes, I will come on Saturday.

text: No, you sure?  Okay, but on Monday we’re going to do different fractions, it’s on the back of that, and we’re going to do whole numbers with fractions, they call them mixed numbers. Okay?  Give yourselves a round of applause.  You guys did a good job! [Applause!]
speaker: teacher
text_arabic: لا، أنت متأكد؟ حسنا، لكن يوم الاثنين سنقوم بعمل كسور مختلفة، وهذا على الجزء الخلفي من ذلك، ونحن سنقوم بعمل أرقام كاملة مع كسور، يطلقون عليها أرقام مختلطة. حسنا؟ أعطوا أنفسكم جولة من التصفيق. لقد قمتم بعمل جيد! [تصفيق!]
text_back_translated: Okay, but on Monday we're going to do different fractions, and this is on the back of it, and we're going to do whole numbers with fractions, they call them mixed numbers.
